description: Voice/person profiles used to identify speakers and sort recordings. Add new profiles over time.

profiles.name: Marc (Mark Menowitz)
profiles.role: User's boss; principal at Apartment Corp (real-estate investment/property management); also driving the PropertyMax software venture
profiles.sorting_rule: Recordings where Marc is present and behaving inappropriately (yelling, screaming, berating staff) go to this folder.

voice_characteristics.notes: Older male voice; terse, gruff, impatient; asks rapid-fire questions ('What happened?', 'Why am I not getting it?'). CONFIRMED ON-TAPE VOICE REFERENCES: (1) Monday_V2026-01-01-21-07-46 at 21:46 he self-identifies on a voicemail: 'Uh, it's Mark. Give me a call...'; (2) same file 13:06-13:37 eviction-list demand to Brandon; (3) Monday_V2026-01-01-19-47-25 44:01-47:45 (deal/property talk); (4) Wednesday Bob Bell 09-04 at 22:34 phone call re: Sam's access ('regional one'). Reference yelling sample: 'Marc Screaming at Ethan - 2026-06-24.m4a' at ~9:05.

temper_evidence: Ethan: 'you know how Mark is... he's got a short fuse' (Ethan Company Mail Error 13:17)
Robert: 'Mark came in here yesterday SCREAMING at me... he wanted them done today' (Tuesday 10-11 24:13, re: unit inspections, 6/29)
Robert: 'Mark came in here yelling at me yesterday' (Tuesday 10-11 29:19)
Marc phone-screamed at Nicole: 'Who the fuck do you think you are?' (reported Tuesday 10-11 40:45)

Office fear culture: 'I'm not gonna get yelled at for you... we're still both gonna get yelled at' (Robert, Tuesday 10-11 28:18-28:56); 'I'm just not in the mood to get yelled at for giving you over access or under access' + 'The thing we don't do is bother Mark in the morning' (Brandon, Wednesday 09-04 19:35-20:22)
'Working for Mark is probably great, bro' — Brandon: 'I don't know if that's the word' (Wednesday 09-04 23:39)
Worst yelling account on record: Dec 28 12-14 — colleague recounts Marc screaming episode (batch 3, secondhand)
Dec 27 12-31 at 50:48 — 'Mark comes in yelling' account (batch 3, secondhand)
Jul 2 08-55 — Ethan and Brandon discuss the existence of the Marc-screaming recording itself (batch 3)
Controlling about tools: 'Mark would have thrown a fit' re: Google Drive; forces apartment-corp Gmail logins (Dec 27 17-53)

Jul 2 13-55 at 57:24 — colleague: 'Mark was here, and Mark was attacking me... Mark hired me and told me that Ellie was my boss... he has shit fits when you listen to her' (secondhand; undermines Ellie's authority)

Jul 7 15-06 at 02:24-04:35 — Brandon: 'I'm so sick of this dude rewriting history for himself to be able to get ahead' — Marc blamed staff for a temp-employee approval mix-up (Leslie accidentally approved someone), went directly to Blake claiming David didn't do something despite Marc having said not to approve; staff can't reach him for approvals ('He's always too busy')

Jul 7 17-13 (device-dated 2076-06-07) at 01:37-03:36 — staff FedEx dilemma: 'Mark will yell' if packages go out wrong; Nicole overrides ('he won't ask'); pattern of urgent demands then forgetting ('I need you to look at the spam filter right now' then 'I'm busy now'; 'You were just pretending to be me')

Jul 7 17-13 at 05:35-06:21 — colleague Tony: Marc 'just communicates through Robert to me... I think he just wants to walk over people, and I'm not the guy'; Marc stopped daily calls when Tony pushed back

known_interactions.context: Eviction email demands (Monday 21-07 13:06); deadline check-ins (Save.WAV 32:21); access-level calls (Wednesday 09-04 22:34)
Screamed at him in person 6/29 over unit inspections (Tuesday 10-11)
Phone-screamed 'Who the fuck do you think you are?' (~6/29, reported Tuesday 10-11 40:45); staff fear using cost-seg credits without his OK
Co-authority staff fear ('excuse to Mark and Todd'); Todd in Italy late June
Met in person for the first time Jul 1 (Wednesday 16-08 23:04)
Negotiated a SAFE investment in SelectX (OnlyFans-competitor platform) Jul 1; 'Okay, so I'm in' pending attorney review (Wednesday 16-08 24:19-50:00) — SENSITIVE

reference_recordings.notable_moment: Extended calm negotiating Marc 24:19-50:00 (SelectX pitch) — best long-form voice reference

profiles.name: Ethan
profiles.role: User's co-worker (IT-adjacent: Exchange/Outlook, SpamTitan, Grid 3D; helping Robert with Apartment Fest); had Air Force mock physical (Jan)
profiles.sorting_rule: One-on-one Brandon + Ethan conversations where Ethan is a main speaker route to the Ethan folder. Group office conversations where Ethan is one of several speakers stay in Meetings/Work with his lines tagged. USER HEADS-UP (Jul 8, 2026): incoming recording contains a long Brandon+Ethan conversation about pilots, airplanes, and travel — use it to enrich this profile (voice characteristics, speech patterns, content anchors).

voice_characteristics.notes: Young male voice; friendly, casual banter with Brandon. Main speaker in 'Ethan Company Mail Error.WAV' (47m54s, 2026-06-23). Backed Robert up during the Keturah/Ginger accusations. Wary of Marc ('short fuse'). ADDITIONAL CONFIRMED SAMPLE: ROSE-REC2_V2076-06-08-10-41-30.WAV at 15:10 — extended aviation/travel conversation confirmed by Brandon (Jul 11, 2026).
voice_characteristics.speech_patterns: Very conversational, trades 'Yeah' and 'Oh' affirmations rapidly with Brandon. Brings in anecdotes ('my brother had a friend...'). Speaks knowledgeably but casually about systems (phone extensions) and trivia (pilot experience requirements, lie-flat seats, JetBlue vs American, private vs commercial safety). Scared of flying personally but deeply knowledgeable about aviation. Signature opener: 'Also, funny, uh, fun fact about that...' before anecdotes.

reference_recordings.notable_moment: Primary 47-min voice reference; main speaker throughout
At 15:10 — extended aviation discussion (JetBlue lie-flat seats, private vs commercial safety, celebrity plane crashes). Confirmed by Brandon 2026-07-11.

known_interactions.context: Casual office banter, IT/system setup (Myesha phone extension), deep dives into trivia (private vs. commercial pilots, airplane crashes, travel).

profiles.name: Robert Haley
profiles.role: Co-worker; oversees property-manager inspections (My Loan Workers app); transitioning into Nicole's role while training Brandon on his own role; email robert@apartmentsgroup.com
profiles.sorting_rule: One-on-one Brandon + Robert conversations where Robert is a main speaker route to the Robert folder. Group office conversations where Robert is one of several speakers stay in Meetings/Work with his lines tagged. His manager calls -> Calls.

voice_characteristics.notes: Male, animated, heavy profanity, storyteller; HAS A SLIGHT LISP (per Brandon, Jul 8). Self-identifies on calls ('Hi Ashley, this is Robert Haley', Tuesday 10-11 23:35). Was screamed at by Marc 6/29; involved in Keturah/Asia/Ginger HR drama; talked to Blake and Miles (New York). USER HEADS-UP (Jul 8): appears in the background of a late-afternoon Jul 8 recording talking about peptides and blood work — use for voice enrichment.
voice_characteristics.content_anchors: Peptides, blood work (Jul 8 afternoon); property-manager inspections; Claude/AI suggestions (suggested Claude for cost segs)

profiles.sorting_rule: Proposed profile (3+ appearances). Calls with Jeff -> Calls.

voice_characteristics.notes: Older male; direct, repeats phrases ('freaking nightmare'). Save.WAV (02:37-27:09), Ethan Company Mail Error (42:46-45:24), V2025-12-26 (40:29+).

profiles.name: Gerald
profiles.role: Brandon's boyfriend and business collaborator; they record calls to develop business ideas together and Brandon teaches him AI skills for use in his work
profiles.sorting_rule: Recordings that are one-on-one calls/conversations between Brandon and Gerald (business ideas, AI coaching) -> Gerald folder.

custom_summary_format.note: In addition to the standard summary + dialogue + notable moments, every Gerald recording report MUST include these sections:
sections: Business Ideas: every idea discussed, with enough context to revisit later
Action Items / Tasks: split into Brandon's tasks and Gerald's tasks
Research Reminders: things Brandon said he'd look into; tools/services mentioned worth exploring
AI Lessons Covered: what Brandon taught Gerald, to track progress and plan next sessions

voice_characteristics.notes: CONFIRMED 2026-07-11 by Brandon. First confirmed Gerald voice sample. Male, calm/measured, warm and supportive tone. Short affirmations: 'Yeah,' 'Okay,' 'Got it' (repeated). Plays piano ('I normally play piano until 9:00'). Possible Spanish-influenced speech patterns ('da, da, da,' phrasing). Intimate, emotionally open register; mentions going through a 'low' period. NOTE: this particular call is personal (not business/AI) — topics include pageant, office coffee, Dynasty TV show, drug hookup. Future Gerald calls with business/AI topics should use the custom_summary_format.
voice_characteristics.speech_patterns: Short affirmations, calm pacing, piano player, emotionally expressive in personal context.

reference_recordings.notable_moment: Full 14-min personal call; primary voice reference for Gerald

profiles.name: Momma Rose
profiles.role: Brandon's mother. Frequent long personal phone calls with Brandon (family news, hometown/community updates, Brandon's work stories and AI projects).
profiles.sorting_rule: Recordings that are one-on-one calls/conversations between Brandon and Momma Rose -> Momma Rose folder.

voice_characteristics.notes: CONFIRMED VOICE SAMPLE: voice_samples/Momma_Rose_sample.WAV (2h00m, provided by Brandon 2026-07-07). Older Southern female voice; warm, chatty; frequent 'Oh my gosh', 'Oh', 'Lord', 'Yeah'; recounts family/community news (deaths, relatives, neighbors); asks Brandon follow-up questions about his work and AI ('Can you do that?'). Sample content anchors: discusses Marc's yelling and Brandon's AI profile system (00:20-01:50); Sarah/Chelsea Ferguson death news (03:18-04:05); Karen/Jackson/Luke/Keaton family talk; references matching ROSE-REC1_V2025-06-25-08-22-10 (same conversation captured device-side, June 2025).
voice_characteristics.speech_patterns: Says 'hollering', 'yells at us', 'Well, I know', 'I'll look it up'; slower cadence than Brandon's co-workers; phone-call context (one side sometimes muffled).

known_interactions.context: Long personal calls; he explains AI/automation projects to her; she shares family and hometown news

known_interactions.with: Trevor, Karen, Jackson, Luke, Keaton, Molly, Dustin

reference_recordings.notable_moment: Primary confirmed voice reference (entire file); AI profile discussion 00:49-01:50
Same/similar conversation captured on device; retroactively identified as a Brandon + Momma Rose call

default_sorting_rules: Phone calls (one side audible, phone-call context) -> Calls
Multi-person work discussions, standups, reviews -> Meetings
Marc behaving inappropriately/yelling -> Marc's Inappropriate Screaming
One-on-one Brandon + Gerald calls (business ideas, AI coaching) -> Gerald (with custom summary: Business Ideas / Action Items / Research Reminders / AI Lessons)
One-on-one Brandon + Momma Rose calls/conversations -> Momma Rose folder
